patches.hypothesis: Maintain test passing and handle general cases by using a more general approach to check for null values and properly provide boundaries for the size parameter
Input string is not being truncated if it exceeds the specified width, leading to an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException.
patches.changes: - str.getChars(0, strLen, buffer, size); + str.getChars(0, Math.min(strLen, width), buffer, size);
patches.diff: - str.getChars(0, strLen, buffer, size); + str.getChars(0, Math.min(strLen, width), buffer, size);
